---
title: "BBB 26 — Cartola"
subtitle: "Sistema de pontuação Cartola BBB"
description: "Sistema de pontuação Cartola BBB — ranking e histórico de pontos"
lang: pt-BR
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import json
import re
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from pathlib import Path
from collections import defaultdict
from textwrap import dedent
import sys

sys.path.append(str(Path("scripts").resolve()))
from data_utils import (
    require_clean_manual_events, setup_bbb_dark_theme,
    CARTOLA_POINTS, POINTS_LABELS, POINTS_EMOJI,
)

require_clean_manual_events()
setup_bbb_dark_theme()


def contrast_color(hex_color):
    hex_color = hex_color.lstrip('#')
    if len(hex_color) != 6:
        return '#fff'
    r, g, b = (int(hex_color[i:i + 2], 16) for i in (0, 2, 4))
    luminance = (0.299 * r + 0.587 * g + 0.114 * b) / 255
    return '#000' if luminance > 0.6 else '#fff'


def emit(html: str) -> None:
    """Print HTML without leading indentation that would create markdown code blocks."""
    cleaned = "\n".join(line.lstrip() for line in dedent(html).splitlines())
    print(cleaned)


def slugify_name(name: str) -> str:
    base = re.sub(r'[^a-z0-9]+', '-', name.lower()).strip('-')
    return base or "participante"


with open("data/derived/cartola_data.json") as f:
    cartola = json.load(f)

leaderboard = cartola["leaderboard"]
stats = cartola["stats"]
n_weeks = cartola["_metadata"]["n_weeks"]
weekly_points = cartola["weekly_points"]

n_with_points = stats["n_with_points"]
n_active = stats["n_active"]
total_positive = stats["total_positive"]
total_negative = stats["total_negative"]
seen_roles = stats["seen_roles"]
current_roles = stats["current_roles"]
leader = leaderboard[0] if leaderboard else None

PARTICIPANT_INFO = {}
AVATARS = {}
for entry in leaderboard:
    name = entry['name']
    PARTICIPANT_INFO[name] = {
        'grupo': entry['grupo'],
        'avatar': entry['avatar'],
        'active': entry['active'],
    }
    if entry['avatar']:
        AVATARS[name] = entry['avatar']

active_participants = {entry['name'] for entry in leaderboard if entry.get('active')}

all_participants = sorted(PARTICIPANT_INFO.keys())
palette = (
    px.colors.qualitative.Plotly + px.colors.qualitative.D3 +
    px.colors.qualitative.Set2 + px.colors.qualitative.Bold
)
participant_colors = {name: palette[i % len(palette)] for i, name in enumerate(all_participants)}

all_points = defaultdict(lambda: defaultdict(list))
for week_str, participants in weekly_points.items():
    week = int(week_str)
    for participant, events in participants.items():
        for evt_data in events:
            all_points[participant][week].append(tuple(evt_data))

manual_events_path = Path('data/manual_events.json')
if manual_events_path.exists():
    with open(manual_events_path) as f:
        manual_events = json.load(f)
else:
    manual_events = {
        'participants': {},
        'weekly_events': [],
        'special_events': [],
        'power_events': [],
        'cartola_points_log': []
    }

weekly_data = manual_events.get('weekly_events', [])
manual_open_weeks = sorted(
    we.get('week')
    for we in weekly_data
    if isinstance(we, dict) and we.get('week') is not None and not we.get('end_date')
)
current_cycle_week = manual_open_weeks[-1] if manual_open_weeks else n_weeks
is_transition_cycle = current_cycle_week != n_weeks
max_week_for_display = current_cycle_week if is_transition_cycle else n_weeks
participant_slug = {name: slugify_name(name) for name in all_participants}
lider_points = CARTOLA_POINTS['lider']
anjo_points = CARTOLA_POINTS['anjo']
monstro_points = CARTOLA_POINTS['monstro']
imune_points = CARTOLA_POINTS['imunizado']
```

<div class="cartola-page" id="cartola-page" hidden></div>

```{python}
#| label: destaques
#| output: asis

nav_html = [
    '<nav id="cartola-quick-jump" class="cartola-jump-nav" aria-label="Atalhos da página Cartola">',
    '<a class="cartola-jump-link" href="#participantes">Participantes</a>',
    '<a class="cartola-jump-link" href="#evolucao">Evolução</a>',
    '<a class="cartola-jump-link" href="#semanas">Semanas</a>',
    '<a class="cartola-jump-link" href="#pontos">Sistema de Pontos</a>',
    '</nav>',
]

print('\n'.join(nav_html))
```

```{python}
#| label: kpi-boxes
#| output: asis

leader_events_count = sum(1 for p in leaderboard for evt in p.get('events', []) if evt.get('event') == 'lider')
anjo_events_count = sum(1 for p in leaderboard for evt in p.get('events', []) if evt.get('event') == 'anjo')
monstro_events_count = sum(1 for p in leaderboard for evt in p.get('events', []) if evt.get('event') == 'monstro')

emit(f'''
<section class="cartola-kpi-grid">
  <article class="cartola-kpi cartola-kpi-week">
    <p class="cartola-kpi-value">{current_cycle_week}</p>
    <p class="cartola-kpi-label">Semana do Ciclo</p>
  </article>
  <article class="cartola-kpi cartola-kpi-role">
    <p class="cartola-kpi-value">{leader_events_count}</p>
    <p class="cartola-kpi-label">👑 Lideranças</p>
  </article>
  <article class="cartola-kpi cartola-kpi-role">
    <p class="cartola-kpi-value">{anjo_events_count}</p>
    <p class="cartola-kpi-label">😇 Anjos</p>
  </article>
  <article class="cartola-kpi cartola-kpi-positive">
    <p class="cartola-kpi-value">{total_positive:+d}</p>
    <p class="cartola-kpi-label">Pontos Positivos</p>
  </article>
  <article class="cartola-kpi cartola-kpi-negative">
    <p class="cartola-kpi-value">{total_negative:+d}</p>
    <p class="cartola-kpi-label">Pontos Negativos</p>
  </article>
</section>
<p class="cartola-kpi-footnote">Atualizado conforme os novos acontecimentos oficiais do programa.</p>
''')
```

```{python}
#| label: kpi-extremes
#| output: asis

status_by_participant = {}
manual_participants = manual_events.get('participants', {}) if isinstance(manual_events.get('participants', {}), dict) else {}
for p in leaderboard:
    name = p['name']
    info = manual_participants.get(name, {})
    status_by_participant[name] = info.get('status', '')


def build_extreme_candidates(week_filter=None, include_inactive=True):
    positives = []
    negatives = []
    for p in leaderboard:
        if not include_inactive and not p.get('active', True):
            continue

        name = p['name']
        events = p.get('events', [])
        if week_filter is not None:
            events = [evt for evt in events if evt.get('week') == week_filter]

        positive_total = 0
        negative_total = 0
        positive_breakdown = defaultdict(lambda: {'points': 0, 'count': 0})
        negative_breakdown = defaultdict(lambda: {'points': 0, 'count': 0})
        for evt in events:
            evt_type = evt.get('event', '')
            points = evt.get('points', 0)
            if points > 0:
                positive_total += points
                positive_breakdown[evt_type]['points'] += points
                positive_breakdown[evt_type]['count'] += 1
            elif points < 0:
                negative_total += points
                negative_breakdown[evt_type]['points'] += points
                negative_breakdown[evt_type]['count'] += 1

        positive_reasons = sorted(
            (
                {'event': evt_type, 'points': info['points'], 'count': info['count']}
                for evt_type, info in positive_breakdown.items()
            ),
            key=lambda x: (-x['points'], -x['count'], x['event'])
        )
        negative_reasons = sorted(
            (
                {'event': evt_type, 'points': info['points'], 'count': info['count']}
                for evt_type, info in negative_breakdown.items()
            ),
            key=lambda x: (x['points'], -x['count'], x['event'])
        )

        base = {
            'name': name,
            'avatar': p.get('avatar', ''),
            'active': p.get('active', True),
            'status': status_by_participant.get(name, ''),
        }
        if positive_total > 0:
            positives.append({**base, 'points': positive_total, 'reasons': positive_reasons})
        if negative_total < 0:
            negatives.append({**base, 'points': negative_total, 'reasons': negative_reasons})
    return positives, negatives


week_positive_points_by_participant, week_negative_points_by_participant = build_extreme_candidates(current_cycle_week, include_inactive=False)
all_time_positive_points_by_participant, all_time_negative_points_by_participant = build_extreme_candidates(include_inactive=True)

week_positive_top5 = sorted(week_positive_points_by_participant, key=lambda x: (-x['points'], x['name']))[:5]
week_negative_top5 = sorted(week_negative_points_by_participant, key=lambda x: (x['points'], x['name']))[:5]
all_time_positive_top5 = sorted(all_time_positive_points_by_participant, key=lambda x: (-x['points'], x['name']))[:5]
all_time_negative_top5 = sorted(all_time_negative_points_by_participant, key=lambda x: (x['points'], x['name']))[:5]


def render_extreme_top5_card(tone_class, kicker, entries, empty_text, caption):
    if not entries:
        emit(f'''
<article class="cartola-extreme-card {tone_class}">
  <p class="cartola-extreme-kicker">{kicker}</p>
  <p class="cartola-extreme-name">{empty_text}</p>
</article>
''')
        return

    emit(f'''
<article class="cartola-extreme-card {tone_class}">
  <p class="cartola-extreme-kicker">{kicker}</p>
  <div class="cartola-extreme-list">
''')

    max_abs_points = max(abs(item['points']) for item in entries) if entries else 1
    max_abs_points = max(max_abs_points, 1)

    for pos, entry in enumerate(entries, start=1):
        name = entry['name']
        points = entry['points']
        reasons = entry.get('reasons', [])
        avatar = entry.get('avatar', '')
        is_active = entry.get('active', True)
        status_text = entry.get('status', '') if not is_active else ''
        row_class = ' is-inactive' if not is_active else ''
        status_badge = f'<span class="cartola-status-badge">{status_text or "saiu"}</span>' if not is_active else ''
        value_tone = 'points-pos' if points > 0 else ('points-neg' if points < 0 else 'points-zero')
        bar_width = (abs(points) / max_abs_points) * 100
        reason_parts = []
        for reason in reasons[:3]:
            reason_label = POINTS_LABELS.get(reason['event'], reason['event'])
            reason_emoji = POINTS_EMOJI.get(reason['event'], '•')
            reason_points = reason['points']
            reason_count = reason.get('count', 0)
            if reason_count > 1:
                reason_parts.append(f"{reason_emoji} {reason_label} ({reason_points:+d}, {reason_count}x)")
            else:
                reason_parts.append(f"{reason_emoji} {reason_label} ({reason_points:+d})")
        reason_summary = " · ".join(reason_parts) if reason_parts else "Sem eventos detalhados"

        emit(f'''
<div class="cartola-extreme-row{row_class}" title="{reason_summary}">
  <p class="cartola-extreme-rank">{pos}</p>
''')
        if avatar:
            emit(f'<img src="{avatar}" alt="Avatar {name}" class="cartola-extreme-row-avatar">')
        else:
            emit('<div class="cartola-extreme-row-avatar cartola-avatar-fallback">?</div>')
        emit(f'''
  <div class="cartola-extreme-row-main">
    <p class="cartola-extreme-row-name">{name}</p>
    {status_badge}
    <div class="cartola-extreme-row-bar">
      <div class="cartola-extreme-row-fill" style="width: {bar_width:.1f}%;"></div>
    </div>
    <details class="card-reason">
      <summary class="card-reason-toggle">Ver motivo</summary>
      <p class="card-reason-text">{reason_summary}</p>
    </details>
  </div>
  <p class="cartola-extreme-row-value {value_tone}">{points:+d}</p>
</div>
''')

    emit(f'''
  </div>
  <p class="cartola-extreme-caption">{caption}</p>
</article>
''')


emit('<section class="cartola-extremes-grid" aria-label="Destaques de pontuação da semana e da temporada">')
render_extreme_top5_card(
    "cartola-extreme-positive",
    f"SEMANA {current_cycle_week} • MAIOR PONTUAÇÃO POSITIVA (TOP 5)",
    week_positive_top5,
    "Nenhum participante com saldo positivo na semana",
    "soma em eventos positivos da semana atual",
)
render_extreme_top5_card(
    "cartola-extreme-negative",
    f"SEMANA {current_cycle_week} • MAIOR PONTUAÇÃO NEGATIVA (TOP 5)",
    week_negative_top5,
    "Ainda não houve lançamentos negativos nesta semana",
    "soma em eventos negativos da semana atual",
)
render_extreme_top5_card(
    "cartola-extreme-positive",
    "TEMPORADA • MAIOR PONTUAÇÃO POSITIVA (TOP 5)",
    all_time_positive_top5,
    "Sem dados na temporada",
    "soma acumulada em eventos positivos — inclui participantes ativos e eliminados",
)
render_extreme_top5_card(
    "cartola-extreme-negative",
    "TEMPORADA • MAIOR PONTUAÇÃO NEGATIVA (TOP 5)",
    all_time_negative_top5,
    "Sem dados na temporada",
    "soma acumulada em eventos negativos — inclui participantes ativos e eliminados",
)
print('</section>')
```

## Participantes {#participantes}

Cards completos com leitura de pontuação acumulada, eventos e evolução por semana.

```{python}
#| label: participants-cards
#| output: asis

ranked_all_players_for_jump = sorted(leaderboard, key=lambda x: (-x['total'], x['name']))
emit('<section class="cartola-player-cards-grid" aria-label="Cards completos de participantes">')

for p in ranked_all_players_for_jump:
    name = p['name']
    total = p['total']
    group = p.get('grupo', 'Pipoca')
    avatar = p.get('avatar', '')
    active = p.get('active', True)
    events = p.get('events', [])
    name_slug = participant_slug.get(name, slugify_name(name))
    target_id = f'cartola-player-{name_slug}'
    participant_color = participant_colors.get(name, '#666')
    badge_text_color = contrast_color(participant_color)
    status_text = manual_events.get('participants', {}).get(name, {}).get('status', 'saiu') if not active else ''

    weekly_score_map = defaultdict(int)
    event_stats = defaultdict(lambda: {'count': 0, 'total': 0})
    positive_total = 0
    negative_total = 0
    for evt in events:
        week = evt.get('week')
        points = evt.get('points', 0)
        evt_type = evt.get('event', '')
        if isinstance(week, int):
            weekly_score_map[week] += points
        event_stats[evt_type]['count'] += 1
        event_stats[evt_type]['total'] += points
        if points > 0:
            positive_total += points
        elif points < 0:
            negative_total += points

    cycle_total = weekly_score_map.get(current_cycle_week, 0)
    total_tone = 'points-pos' if total > 0 else ('points-neg' if total < 0 else 'points-zero')
    cycle_tone = 'points-pos' if cycle_total > 0 else ('points-neg' if cycle_total < 0 else 'points-zero')
    state_attr = ' data-player-state="inactive"' if not active else ''
    status_badge = f'<span class="cartola-status-badge">{status_text}</span>' if status_text else ''

    positive_rows = []
    negative_rows = []
    for evt_type, stat in sorted(event_stats.items(), key=lambda x: -abs(x[1]['total'])):
        total_pts = stat['total']
        if total_pts == 0:
            continue
        emoji = POINTS_EMOJI.get(evt_type, '•')
        label = POINTS_LABELS.get(evt_type, evt_type)
        row = (
            f'<div class="cartola-player-event-row">'
            f'<span class="cartola-player-event-label">{emoji} {label} <small>{stat["count"]}x</small></span>'
            f'<span class="cartola-player-event-value {"points-pos" if total_pts > 0 else "points-neg"}">{total_pts:+d}</span>'
            f'</div>'
        )
        if total_pts > 0:
            positive_rows.append(row)
        else:
            negative_rows.append(row)

    if not positive_rows:
        positive_rows.append('<div class="cartola-player-event-row"><span class="cartola-player-event-label">Sem eventos positivos</span><span class="cartola-player-event-value points-zero">+0</span></div>')
    if not negative_rows:
        negative_rows.append('<div class="cartola-player-event-row"><span class="cartola-player-event-label">Sem eventos negativos</span><span class="cartola-player-event-value points-zero">0</span></div>')

    week_cells = []
    for week in range(1, max_week_for_display + 1):
        week_total = weekly_score_map.get(week, 0)
        week_tone = 'points-pos' if week_total > 0 else ('points-neg' if week_total < 0 else 'points-zero')
        week_cells.append(
            f'<div class="cartola-player-week-cell">'
            f'<span class="cartola-player-week-label">Semana {week}</span>'
            f'<span class="cartola-player-week-value {week_tone}">{week_total:+d}</span>'
            f'</div>'
        )

    emit(f'''
<article id="{target_id}" class="cartola-player-card"{state_attr} style="--card-accent: {participant_color};">
  <header class="cartola-player-card-head">
    <div class="cartola-player-main-avatar-wrap">
''')
    if avatar:
        print(f'<img src="{avatar}" alt="Avatar {name}" class="cartola-player-main-avatar">')
    else:
        print('<div class="cartola-player-main-avatar cartola-avatar-fallback">?</div>')
    emit(f'''
    </div>
    <div class="cartola-player-main-copy">
      <p class="cartola-player-name-line">
        <span class="cartola-player-name">{name}</span>
        <span class="cartola-group" style="background:{participant_color}; color:{badge_text_color};">{group}</span>
        {status_badge}
      </p>
      <p class="cartola-player-total {total_tone}">{total:+d}</p>
    </div>
  </header>

  <div class="cartola-player-meta-grid">
    <div class="cartola-player-meta-card">
      <p class="meta-label">Semana {current_cycle_week}</p>
      <p class="meta-value {cycle_tone}">{cycle_total:+d}</p>
    </div>
    <div class="cartola-player-meta-card">
      <p class="meta-label">Positivos acumulados</p>
      <p class="meta-value points-pos">+{positive_total}</p>
    </div>
    <div class="cartola-player-meta-card">
      <p class="meta-label">Negativos acumulados</p>
      <p class="meta-value points-neg">{negative_total}</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cartola-player-event-stack-grid">
    <section class="cartola-player-event-stack is-positive">
      <h4>Eventos positivos</h4>
      {''.join(positive_rows[:5])}
    </section>
    <section class="cartola-player-event-stack is-negative">
      <h4>Eventos negativos</h4>
      {''.join(negative_rows[:5])}
    </section>
  </div>

  <div class="cartola-player-week-grid">
    {''.join(week_cells)}
  </div>
</article>
''')

print('</section>')
```

## Evolução {#evolucao}

Gráfico com filtros de leitura rápida: **Top 8**, **Apenas Ativos** e **Todos**.

```{python}
#| label: evolution-chart

cumulative_evolution = cartola.get("cumulative_evolution", [])

if cumulative_evolution:
    df = pd.DataFrame(cumulative_evolution)
    df.rename(columns={"week": "Semana", "name": "Participante", "cumulative_points": "Pontos"}, inplace=True)

    final_scores = df.groupby('Participante')['Pontos'].last().to_dict()
    sorted_participants = sorted(final_scores.keys(), key=lambda x: -final_scores[x])

    fig = go.Figure()
    trace_order = []

    for name in sorted_participants:
        df_p = df[df['Participante'] == name].sort_values('Semana')
        if df_p.empty:
            continue

        color = participant_colors.get(name, '#666')
        final_pts = final_scores[name]
        trace_order.append(name)

        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=df_p['Semana'],
            y=df_p['Pontos'],
            mode='lines+markers',
            name=f"{name} ({final_pts:+d})",
            line=dict(color=color, width=2),
            marker=dict(size=8, color=color),
            hovertemplate=f'{name}<br>Semana %{{x}}: %{{y:+d}} pts<extra></extra>',
        ))

    top_n = 8
    visible_top = [idx < top_n for idx, _ in enumerate(trace_order)]
    visible_active = [name in active_participants for name in trace_order]
    visible_all = [True for _ in trace_order]

    for idx, _ in enumerate(trace_order):
        fig.data[idx].visible = visible_top[idx]

    fig.update_layout(
        title="Evolução da Pontuação Cartola (Top 8)",
        xaxis_title="Semana",
        yaxis_title="Pontos Acumulados",
        xaxis=dict(tickmode='linear', tick0=1, dtick=1),
        yaxis=dict(zeroline=True, zerolinecolor='rgba(255,255,255,0.3)', zerolinewidth=1),
        height=520,
        hovermode='x unified',
        legend=dict(font=dict(size=10), orientation='v'),
        margin=dict(t=120, r=20, b=60, l=50),
        updatemenus=[
            dict(
                type='buttons',
                direction='right',
                x=0,
                y=1.22,
                xanchor='left',
                yanchor='top',
                bgcolor='rgba(26,26,30,0.95)',
                bordercolor='rgba(255,255,255,0.12)',
                borderwidth=1,
                buttons=[
                    dict(
                        label='Top 8',
                        method='update',
                        args=[
                            {'visible': visible_top},
                            {'title': 'Evolução da Pontuação Cartola (Top 8)'}
                        ],
                    ),
                    dict(
                        label='Apenas Ativos',
                        method='update',
                        args=[
                            {'visible': visible_active},
                            {'title': 'Evolução da Pontuação Cartola (Apenas Ativos)'}
                        ],
                    ),
                    dict(
                        label='Todos',
                        method='update',
                        args=[
                            {'visible': visible_all},
                            {'title': 'Evolução da Pontuação Cartola (Todos)'}
                        ],
                    ),
                ],
            )
        ],
        annotations=[
            dict(
                text='Modo do gráfico:',
                x=0,
                y=1.28,
                xref='paper',
                yref='paper',
                showarrow=False,
                font=dict(size=12, color='#c7d0d7')
            )
        ]
    )

    fig.show()
else:
    print("*Dados insuficientes para gerar o gráfico de evolução.*")
```

<div id="cartola-chart-mode" class="cartola-chart-note">Modo inicial: <strong>Top 8</strong>. Use os botões do gráfico para alternar a leitura.</div>

# Semanas {#semanas}

Detalhamento semanal por papéis, eventos e pontuação. Em mobile, abrimos por resumo e expandimos sob demanda.

```{python}
#| label: weekly-tabs
#| output: asis

max_week_for_display = current_cycle_week if is_transition_cycle else n_weeks

if max_week_for_display > 0:
    for week in range(1, max_week_for_display + 1):
        week_info = next((w for w in weekly_data if w.get('week') == week), None)
        open_attr = ' open' if week == current_cycle_week else ''
        emit(f'''
<details class="cartola-week-details"{open_attr}>
<summary class="cartola-week-summary-toggle">Semana {week}</summary>
<div class="cartola-week-details-body">
''')

        week_roles = {'Líder': set(), 'Anjo': set(), 'Monstro': set(), 'Imune': set()}
        for participant, weeks_data in all_points.items():
            if week in weeks_data:
                for event, _, _ in weeks_data[week]:
                    if event == 'lider':
                        week_roles['Líder'].add(participant)
                    elif event == 'anjo':
                        week_roles['Anjo'].add(participant)
                    elif event == 'monstro':
                        week_roles['Monstro'].add(participant)
                    elif event == 'imunizado':
                        week_roles['Imune'].add(participant)

        lider = ', '.join(sorted(week_roles['Líder'])) or '—'
        anjo = ', '.join(sorted(week_roles['Anjo'])) or '—'
        monstro = ', '.join(sorted(week_roles['Monstro'])) or '—'
        imune = ', '.join(sorted(week_roles['Imune'])) or '—'

        lider_avatar = AVATARS.get(list(week_roles['Líder'])[0], '') if week_roles['Líder'] else ''
        anjo_avatar = AVATARS.get(list(week_roles['Anjo'])[0], '') if week_roles['Anjo'] else ''
        imune_avatar = AVATARS.get(list(week_roles['Imune'])[0], '') if week_roles['Imune'] else ''
        monstro_avatar = AVATARS.get(list(week_roles['Monstro'])[0], '') if week_roles['Monstro'] else ''

        emit('''
<div class="cartola-week-role-grid">
  <article class="cartola-week-role card-lider">
''')
        if lider_avatar and lider != '—':
            print(f'<img src="{lider_avatar}" class="cartola-week-role-avatar" alt="Avatar líder">')
        emit(f'''
    <div>
      <p class="cartola-week-role-kicker">👑 Líder</p>
      <p class="cartola-week-role-name">{lider}</p>
      <p class="cartola-week-role-points points-pos">{lider_points:+d}</p>
    </div>
  </article>
  <article class="cartola-week-role card-anjo">
''')
        if anjo_avatar and anjo != '—':
            print(f'<img src="{anjo_avatar}" class="cartola-week-role-avatar" alt="Avatar anjo">')
        emit(f'''
    <div>
      <p class="cartola-week-role-kicker">😇 Anjo</p>
      <p class="cartola-week-role-name">{anjo}</p>
      <p class="cartola-week-role-points points-pos">{anjo_points:+d}</p>
    </div>
  </article>
  <article class="cartola-week-role card-imune">
''')
        if imune_avatar and imune != '—':
            print(f'<img src="{imune_avatar}" class="cartola-week-role-avatar" alt="Avatar imune">')
        emit(f'''
    <div>
      <p class="cartola-week-role-kicker">🛡️ Imune</p>
      <p class="cartola-week-role-name">{imune}</p>
      <p class="cartola-week-role-points points-pos">{imune_points:+d}</p>
    </div>
  </article>
  <article class="cartola-week-role card-monstro">
''')
        if monstro_avatar and monstro != '—':
            print(f'<img src="{monstro_avatar}" class="cartola-week-role-avatar" alt="Avatar monstro">')
        emit(f'''
    <div>
      <p class="cartola-week-role-kicker">👹 Monstro</p>
      <p class="cartola-week-role-name">{monstro}</p>
      <p class="cartola-week-role-points points-neg">{monstro_points:+d}</p>
    </div>
  </article>
</div>
''')

        special_events = []
        if week_info:
            raw_bf = week_info.get('big_fone')
            bf_list = raw_bf if isinstance(raw_bf, list) else ([raw_bf] if isinstance(raw_bf, dict) else [])
            for bf in bf_list:
                if isinstance(bf, dict) and bf.get('atendeu'):
                    special_events.append(f"📞 Big Fone · {bf.get('atendeu', '?')} · {bf.get('consequencia', '')}")
            if week_info.get('caixas_surpresa'):
                cs = week_info['caixas_surpresa']
                special_events.append(f"🎁 Caixas-Surpresa · {cs.get('resultado', '')}")
            if week_info.get('notes'):
                special_events.append(f"📝 {week_info['notes']}")

        week_points_list = []
        for participant in all_points:
            if week in all_points[participant]:
                events = all_points[participant][week]
                total = sum(pts for _, pts, _ in events)
                week_points_list.append({
                    'name': participant,
                    'total': total,
                    'events': events,
                    'avatar': AVATARS.get(participant, ''),
                })

        week_points_list = sorted(week_points_list, key=lambda x: -x['total'])

        if week_points_list:
            winner = week_points_list[0]
            loser = week_points_list[-1]
            swing = max(week_points_list, key=lambda x: abs(x['total']))

            swing_tone = 'points-pos' if swing['total'] > 0 else 'points-neg'
            emit(f'''
<div class="cartola-week-summary-grid">
  <article class="cartola-week-summary-card">
    <p class="summary-label">Maior pontuação</p>
    <p class="summary-name">{winner['name']}</p>
    <p class="summary-value points-pos">{winner['total']:+d}</p>
  </article>
  <article class="cartola-week-summary-card">
    <p class="summary-label">Menor pontuação</p>
    <p class="summary-name">{loser['name']}</p>
    <p class="summary-value points-neg">{loser['total']:+d}</p>
  </article>
  <article class="cartola-week-summary-card">
    <p class="summary-label">Maior oscilação</p>
    <p class="summary-name">{swing['name']}</p>
    <p class="summary-value {swing_tone}">{swing['total']:+d}</p>
  </article>
</div>
''')

        if special_events:
            print('<div class="cartola-events-block"><p class="cartola-events-title">Eventos especiais</p>')
            for idx, se in enumerate(special_events, start=1):
                print(f'<div class="cartola-event-row"><span class="cartola-event-index">{idx}</span><span>{se}</span></div>')
            print('</div>')

        if week_points_list:
            print(f'<div class="cartola-week-points" id="cartola-week-collapse-{week}">')
            for idx, wp in enumerate(week_points_list):
                participant_color = participant_colors.get(wp['name'], '#666')
                pts_tone = 'points-pos' if wp['total'] > 0 else ('points-neg' if wp['total'] < 0 else 'points-zero')
                avatar = wp['avatar']
                events_str = ' '.join([POINTS_EMOJI.get(e, '•') for e, _, _ in wp['events']])
                extra_class = ' collapse-extra' if idx >= 6 else ''

                print(f'<article class="cartola-week-point-card{extra_class}" style="--card-accent:{participant_color};">')
                if avatar:
                    print(f'<img src="{avatar}" class="cartola-week-point-avatar" alt="Avatar {wp["name"]}">')
                else:
                    print('<div class="cartola-week-point-avatar cartola-avatar-fallback">?</div>')
                emit(f'''
<div class="cartola-week-point-copy">
  <p class="cartola-week-point-name">{wp['name']}</p>
  <p class="cartola-week-point-events">{events_str}</p>
</div>
<p class="cartola-week-point-score {pts_tone}">{wp['total']:+d}</p>
</article>
''')
            print('</div>')

            if len(week_points_list) > 6:
                emit(f'''
<button type="button"
  class="collapse-toggle"
  id="cartola-week-more-{week}"
  data-target="cartola-week-collapse-{week}"
  data-label-more="Ver pontuações completas"
  data-label-less="Ver resumo semanal">
  Ver pontuações completas
</button>
''')
        else:
            print('\n*Nenhum ponto registrado nesta semana.*\n')

        print('</div></details>')
else:
    print('*Nenhuma semana registrada ainda.*\n')
```

# Sistema de Pontos {#pontos}

<div class="cartola-rules-block">

**Como funciona o Cartola BBB**

Cada evento detectável pontua automaticamente via API (Líder, Anjo, Monstro, Paredão, VIP) e eventos especiais entram por registro manual auditado (Big Fone, Quarto Secreto, saídas).

**Regras-chave**: Líder não acumula com outros itens; Anjo autoimune acumula com Imunizado; Imunizado não acumula com Não Emparedado/Não recebeu votos/Salvo do Paredão.

</div>

```{python}
#| label: points-reference
#| output: asis

emit('''
<div class="cartola-points-grid">
<section class="cartola-points-card card-positive">
<h4>📈 Eventos Positivos</h4>
<table class="table-full fs-base cartola-points-table">
''')

for event, points in CARTOLA_POINTS.items():
    if points > 0:
        emoji = POINTS_EMOJI.get(event, '•')
        label = POINTS_LABELS.get(event, event)
        print(f'<tr><td>{emoji} {label}</td><td class="tr points-pos">+{points}</td></tr>')

emit('''
</table>
</section>

<section class="cartola-points-card card-negative">
<h4>📉 Eventos Negativos</h4>
<table class="table-full fs-base cartola-points-table">
''')

for event, points in CARTOLA_POINTS.items():
    if points < 0:
        emoji = POINTS_EMOJI.get(event, '•')
        label = POINTS_LABELS.get(event, event)
        print(f'<tr><td>{emoji} {label}</td><td class="tr points-neg">{points}</td></tr>')

emit('''
</table>
</section>
</div>
''')

print('<p class="cartola-muted">A pontuação acompanha a apuração diária dos acontecimentos oficiais do jogo.</p>')
print('<p class="cartola-muted">Regras: <strong>Salvo do Paredão</strong> = venceu o Bate e Volta; <strong>Não Eliminado</strong> = indicado que permaneceu; <strong>Não Emparedado</strong> = disponível para votação e fora da lista final.</p>')
```
